body_txt: Breakups are tough, but at some point, it’s time to get back out there and find someone new. In fiction, this often means ending up with someone the exact opposite of the person you just left behind. Meet the Contrasting New Love Interest. This new partner is a contrast, in part or in whole, with the person who came before. There are nearly infinite varieties for this trope, as the contrast could be a matter of looks, personality, values, even things like career and life choices, or perhaps all of the above. Maybe after dating the Nervous Wreck , someone’s decided they want an Adrenaline Makeover with a Thrill Seeker . Maybe after years of dating the Life of the Party , someone wants to settle down with The Quiet One . The difference can be as blatant or subtle as the author wants it to be, all it has to mean is that the character’s new partner is different to the old. This is often a feature of a Love Triangle , and especially a Betty and Veronica trio (in cases where multiple couple combinations are explored), but a Contrasting New Love Interest does not necessarily have to be a pre-existing member of either. Often, the new flame is a Satellite Love Interest who the audience hasn’t seen before, and only remains in the picture as long as this new relationship lasts (potentially as a Temporary Scrappy , depending on the response to the relationship in and out of universe). Equally, the old flame can often be a Disposable Fiancé , who, while not a terrible partner, falls short of the qualities of the main love interest of the work. This can be Truth in Television , and it’s perfectly natural to seek it out deliberately. Maybe you just want to experience someone new, maybe after dating someone you cared about for so long, dating someone too similar would remind you too much of them. Or maybe you just have more than one type. Sub Trope of Contrasting Replacement Character . Contrast Doppelgänger Replacement Love Interest , Doppelgänger Dating , Has a Type , Replacement Goldfish , Suspiciously Similar Substitute , and Replacement Flat Character . Compare True Love is Exceptional , where the contrast is between who they finally stay with and all their previous love interests.
